source_pr.title: *: support signature push down.
source_pr.body:
1. push more signatures, open the switch.
2. like always accepts 3 args.
3. add type info to column and constant pb.

symptoms: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
failure_signature: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR/patch looks like a correctness/refactor/feature change without a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization for the picked test. Keep as insufficient evidence until CI logs or a reliable repro is available.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.

files: Jenkinsfile, expression/expr_to_pb.go, store/tikv/coprocessor.go, expression/builtin_cast.go, util/types/etc.go, store/tikv/gc_worker.go, expression/builtin_arithmetic.go, expression/builtin_compare.go, expression/builtin_control.go, expression/builtin_json.go, expression/builtin_op.go, expression/distsql_builtin.go, expression/builtin.go, expression/builtin_like.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, expression/builtin_miscellaneous.go, expression/distsql_builtin_test.go, expression/builtin_cast_test.go, expression/builtin_string_test.go, expression/expr_to_pb_test.go, util/types/field_type.go, session_test.go
